settings.heading: Track Your Shipment
settings.subheading: Enter your order number and email address below to view your real-time delivery status and shipment progress.
settings.err_empty: Please enter both your Order Number and Email Address.
settings.err_not_found: No matching order found. Please check your order number and email address.
settings.err_server: Unable to reach tracking service. Please try again in a few moments.
